name: Mother Murphy's Dietetic Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 can Can Hunt's Classic Italian dressing
1 can (15 oz) Sliced mushrooms, stems and pieces removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Use about 1/3 to 1/2 the amount of sauce called for on the package directions.
2. Use about half the amount of mozzarella cheese specified in the instructions.
3. Prepare the pizza crust according to the box directions.
4. While the crust is cooling for 5 minutes, grate the mozzarella and cheddar cheeses (about 1/4 the cheddar).
5. Grease a cookie sheet with the grated cheeses.
6. Spread the prepared crust evenly on the greased cookie sheet.
7. Pour the sauce over the crust using a handy fork to spread it.
8. Sprinkle the cheese mixture over the top of the pizza.
9. Arrange the sliced salami close together and overlapping.
10. Scatter the mushrooms over the cheese.
11. Break the black olives into halves.
12. Use all the olives from the can, regardless of dietary concerns.
